\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
\doxylink{cstring_8h}{cstring.\+h} \+: c string library to make Ron happy. Wrapper around plain C strings that handles automatically growing the string as data is concattenated to the end. (note\+: this is an improved version of cstring from supermon. Migrate it into that library eventually... )

-\/matt sottile Structure wrapping the character pointer and size counters (allocated vs. actual used).

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{curlen}{curlen}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{struct____cstring_add2fb4603eb5006f62cbf14ae24af846} 
size\+\_\+t curlen}

Current size of the string stored in the buffer. len \texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}= curlen always, and when len \texorpdfstring{$<$}{<} curlen would be true after a concat operation, we realloc bigger space to keep len \texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}= curlen. \Hypertarget{struct____cstring_a7360b55975153b822efc5217b7734e6a}\index{\_\_cstring@{\_\_cstring}!len@{len}}

size\+\_\+t len}
